name: Olive Garden Toscana Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium Potatoes, cut in half lengthwise and then into 1/4-inch slices
2 cups Kale Leaves, halved and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Place sausage links on a sheet pan and bake for 25 minutes, or until done. Cut into halves lengthwise, then at an angle into 1/4-inch slices.
3. In a large saucepan, cook onions over medium heat until translucent. Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add chicken base, water, and potatoes to the saucepan. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add sausage, kale, and cream. Simmer for another 4 minutes before serving.
Per one cup serving:
265 calories, 17 gm carbohydrate, 10 gm protein, 18 gm fat, 897 mg sodium, 51 mg cholesterol, and 100 mg calcium.
